# Pasture

> Pasture is a beautiful iOS app that lets you chat with local AI models running via Ollama on your Mac — from your iPhone. No terminal, no setup, nothing leaves your devices.

## About

Pasture connects your iPhone to Ollama running on your Mac over your local Wi-Fi network using zero-configuration discovery (Bonjour). Conversations are streamed token-by-token and stay entirely on your own hardware.

The app is free, private by design, and currently in private beta.

## Key features

- Zero-config discovery: your Mac appears by name automatically, no IP addresses needed
- Full streaming chat with every Ollama model installed on your Mac
- Model manager: browse, download, and delete Ollama models from your iPhone
- Fully private: no cloud, no API keys, no data leaving your devices
- Living environments: the UI shifts its look with the time of day
- Free, always — no subscription or credits required

## Requirements

- A Mac running Ollama (ollama.com)
- iPhone on the same Wi-Fi network
- iOS 17.4 or later, macOS 14 or later
- Both devices signed into the same iCloud account

## Links

- Homepage: https://pasture.sh
- Privacy policy: https://pasture.sh/privacy
- Developer: https://x.com/amrith
- Built with Ollama (https://ollama.com) and Loom (https://github.com/EthanLipnik/Loom)
